item.title: Leading Pharma, LLC: Furosemide Tablets, USP, 80 mg, 100 Tablets bottles, Rx only, Recall
item.product: Furosemide Tablets, USP, 80 mg, 100 Tablets bottles, Rx only,
item.summary: CGMP Deviations; presence of N-nitroso-Furosemide (NNF) above the recommended intake limit. Product details: Furosemide Tablets, USP, 80 mg, 100 Tablets bottles, Rx only, Manufactured by: Leading Pharma, LLC, Fairfield, NJ 07004, NDC 69315-118-01
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
